acceptance_criteria: AC1: docs/CLAUDE.md skill size budget replaced with ~150 prose / 250 total / progressive disclosure
AC2: Progressive disclosure pattern documented in docs/CLAUDE.md — exactly one location
AC3: Stop conditions footer rule documented for all pipeline-gating skills
AC4: verification-gate pilot with per-phase reference files, may trim low-signal content
AC5: Migration audit of all existing skills (dynamic discovery, no hardcoded count)
AC6: Contract tests pass for both inline and progressive-disclosure skills
AC7: Spot-check phase command with converted skill works end-to-end
AC8: Enforcement test or pre-merge check for new size budget
AC9: Root/docs CLAUDE.md conventions synced with drift-detection check
